title: Center View
description: Adds a keybind for centering the camera vertically.
body:
This small mod adds a keybind for centering the camera vertically. By default, you can use the "C" key during gameplay to instantly center the camera vertically. The keybind can be changed in the keybinds settings menu.

![Example of the mod being used.](https://i.imgur.com/3siMX8M.gif)
